title: ficus cotinifolia var. hondurensis
intro: Ficus cotinifolia var. hondurensis, also known as Honduran Santa Cruz, is a variety of the Ficus genus of plants, specifically a deciduous tree native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ficus cotinifolia var. hondurensis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections. Ficus cotinifolia var. hondurensis can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
